description:
Reported by a Jira-sync plugin author. `auth-check` and `auth-setup` are invoked with only `--auth-dir`; `push`/`sync` already receive `--config --auth-dir` via Plugin::command() in src/plugin/runner.rs. Without the config path a plugin that targets multiple instances cannot know which one to authenticate against and currently resorts to convention-walking auth-dir/../../../plugins/*.json.

Fix: route auth-check (and the auth-setup hint string) through command() or otherwise pass --config alongside --auth-dir. Update the warning string in runner.rs:52 that tells users how to re-authenticate. Update README/spec docs for the plugin contract. Tests in tests/plugin_*.rs should cover the auth-check invocation argv.
title: auth-setup/auth-check: pass --config to plugin
